content_body:
Gary and Lissa, We so enjoyed our stay at your cabin. It was the prescription we needed - quiet, babbling brook in the background, very serene. We enjoyed our walks around the creek and our area. It was so private and secluded. We were surprised how good the weather was - it was so comfortable all day for us to enjoy the porch, grill out, etc. We love the fireplace, too! Your home provides all the amenities - we will certainly be back!
FL
title: Perfect North Georgia Family Vacation
